Class ListeningPaginationService

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
@Service public class ListeningPaginationService extends Object
Pagination service for analytics listings (songs, artists, albums). Wraps results in DoublyLinkedList for efficient forward/backward traversal.

Windowed methods: getTopSongsWindow and similar are used by the ViewModels for the small preview cards on the analytics page.

Full-list methods: getAllTopSongs, getAllTopAlbums, and getAllTopArtists are used by GenericModalLoader and AnalyticsCacheService to load once and page entirely in memory.

Time Complexity: O(n log k) where n = plays, k = distinct entities.

Space Complexity: O(n) for the full list, O(k) for a windowed result.

  • Constructor Details

    • ListeningPaginationService

      public ListeningPaginationService()

  • Method Details

    • getAllTopSongs

      public DoublyLinkedList<Song> getAllTopSongs()
      Returns all top songs sorted by total listening time, descending. Intended for use with AnalyticsCacheService to keep page in memory.

      Time Complexity: O(n log n).

      Space Complexity: O(n).

    • getAllTopAlbums

      public DoublyLinkedList<Album> getAllTopAlbums()
      Returns all top albums sorted by total listening time, descending. Intended for use with AnalyticsCacheService.

      Time Complexity: O(n log n).

      Space Complexity: O(n).

    • getTopSongsWindow

      public DoublyLinkedList<Song> getTopSongsWindow(int offset, int limit)
      Returns the full top songs ranking for use by TopSongsViewModel. Delegates entirely to getAllTopSongs(); the caller is responsible for slicing via DoublyLinkedList.getWindow(int, int).

      For paginated modal use, prefer getAllTopSongs() combined with AnalyticsCacheService to avoid rebuilding the full ranking on every page turn.

      Time Complexity: O(n log n), full ranking rebuilt on each call.

      Space Complexity: O(n).

      Parameters:
      offset - unused, slicing is performed by the caller
      limit - unused, slicing is performed by the caller
      Returns:
      a fully ranked DoublyLinkedList of Song entities

    • getTopAlbumsWindow

      public DoublyLinkedList<Album> getTopAlbumsWindow(int offset, int limit)
      Returns the full top albums ranking for use by TopAlbumsViewModel. Delegates entirely to getAllTopAlbums(); the caller is responsible for slicing via DoublyLinkedList.getWindow(int, int).

      Time Complexity: O(n log n) Full ranking rebuilt on each call.

      Space Complexity: O(n)

      Parameters:
      offset - unused. Slicing is performed by the caller
      limit - unused. Slicing is performed by the caller
      Returns:
      a fully ranked DoublyLinkedList of Album entities

    • getAllTopArtists

      public DoublyLinkedList<Artist> getAllTopArtists()

      Returns all top songs sorted by total listening time, descending. Intended for use with AnalyticsCacheService to keep page in memory.

      Time Complexity: O(n log n)

      Space Complexity: O(n)

    • getTopSongsCount

      public int getTopSongsCount()
      Returns the number of distinct songs that have at least one valid play in the current user's playback history.

      Time Complexity: O(n) where n = total playback history rows.

      Space Complexity: O(k) where k = distinct songs.

      Returns:
      count of distinct played songs, or 0 if no user is logged in

    • getTopAlbumsCount

      public int getTopAlbumsCount()
      Returns the number of distinct albums that have at least one valid play in the current user's playback history. Songs with no album are excluded.

      Time Complexity: O(n) where n = total playback history rows.

      Space Complexity: O(k) where k = distinct albums.

      Returns:
      count of distinct played albums, or 0 if no user is logged in

    • getTopArtistsWindow

      public DoublyLinkedList<Artist> getTopArtistsWindow(int offset, int limit)
      Returns the full top artists ranking for use by analytics preview cards. Delegates entirely to getAllTopArtists(); the caller is responsible for slicing via DoublyLinkedList.getWindow(int, int).

      Time Complexity: O(n log n) Full ranking rebuilt on each call.

      Space Complexity: O(n)

      Parameters:
      offset - unused. Slicing is performed by the caller
      limit - unused. Slicing is performed by the caller
      Returns:
      a fully ranked DoublyLinkedList of Album entities

    • getAllArtistsRankedByTime

      public DoublyLinkedList<Artist> getAllArtistsRankedByTime()
      Returns all artists in the library ranked by total listening time descending. Artists with no valid plays are included with a total of zero seconds, appearing at the bottom of the list.

      Fetches the complete artist list from the repository and joins it in memory against the playback history totals map. The extra repository query cost is absorbed by AnalyticsCacheService on subsequent loads within the same session.

      Time Complexity: O(n + a) where n = valid playback history rows, a = total artists in the library.

      Space Complexity: O(a) for the result list.

      Returns:
      a DoublyLinkedList of all Artist entities ranked by total listening time, padded with zero-time entries for unplayed artists
